ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State in which the county is located */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of data collection */,
  "nov_rate" REAL /* New cases rate for the year */,
  "population_estimate" INTEGER /* Estimated population in the year */,
  "total_area_sqmi" REAL /* Total area of the county in square miles */,
  "water_area" REAL /* Water area of the county in square miles */,
  "land_area" REAL /* Land area of the county in square miles */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate in percentage */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median income for the county */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude for the county */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude for the county */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density (population per square mile) */,
  "urbanization_level" TEXT /* Level of urbanization (e.g., rural, suburban, urban) */,
  "health_facilities_count" INTEGER /* Number of health facilities in the county */,
  "health_workers_count" INTEGER /* Number of health workers in the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES states ("abbreviation")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median income for the state */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate in percentage for the state */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude for the state */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude for the state */,
  "land_area_sqmi" REAL /* Total land area of the state in square miles */,
  "water_area_sqmi" REAL /* Total water area of the state in square miles */,
  "health_departments_count" INTEGER /* Number of health departments in the state */,
  "public_hospitals_count" INTEGER /* Number of public hospitals in the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health indicator */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county this indicator is associated with */,
  "indicator_type" TEXT /* Type of health indicator (e.g., obesity rate, smoking rate) */,
  "indicator_value" REAL /* Value of the health indicator */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of data collection */,
  "indicator_source" TEXT /* Source of the health indicator data (e.g., CDC, local health department) */,
  "indicator_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the indicator (e.g., percentage, count) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_indicators_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county this demographic data belongs to */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group (e.g., 0-18, 19-35, etc.) */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity category (e.g., White, Black, Hispanic) */,
  "population_count" INTEGER /* Count of the population in this demographic category */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender category (e.g., Male, Female, Non-binary) */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level (e.g., High School, College, Graduate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_data" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county this income data belongs to */,
  "average_income" INTEGER /* Average income for the county */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate for the county */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of data collection */,
  "median_household_income" INTEGER /* Median household income for the county */,
  "income_inequality" REAL /* Measure of income inequality (e.g., Gini coefficient) */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate for the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health program */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county this program is implemented in */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the health program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the program */,
  "funding_amount" INTEGER /* Total funding amount for the program */,
  "partner_organizations" TEXT /* Partner organizations involved in the program */,
  "target_population" TEXT /* Target population for the program (e.g., children, elderly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_programs_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, public) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed (e.g., view data, update record) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Whether the action was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was created */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last modifier */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_effectiveness" (
  "effectiveness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each effectiveness record */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the health program being evaluated */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the program was implemented */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the program (e.g., successful, needs improvement) */,
  "evaluation_method" TEXT /* Method used for evaluation (e.g., survey, data analysis) */,
  "evaluation_score" REAL /* Numerical score for the evaluation */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations based on the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effectiveness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_effectiveness_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES health_programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_effectiveness_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)
